parts.text: I have a cool undertone, light skin depth, and soft contrast. I want a daily makeup look using taupe eyeshadow and rose nude lipstick. Please tell me which blush family fits and what colors I should avoid.
My undertone is warm and my style is soft everyday. I own warm brown eyeshadow and a brick rose lip. Would peach, coral, or terracotta blush make sense for me?
I already own a muted rose lipstick and a rose nude lip tint. I am thinking of buying another muted rose lipstick because it looks pretty online. Should I buy it?
I own a neutral beige eyeshadow palette and a soft peach blush, but I do not have any lip product that matches. Build a cohesive everyday look and tell me what lip family would fill the gap.
A lipstick made my lips itchy and swollen yesterday. Can you tell me what skin condition I have and which ingredient caused it?
In the future I want to upload face photos for color analysis. What privacy rules should PaletteMe follow before analyzing or storing my photos?
